textByHash.22a86b3adfb04aca280e9cada7c96f2b05c4cfde: I am Ketla. I found you wandering the streets. It nearly had you. You were nearly lost.
textByHash.62967626a779f340cc2b07605d0cb8a2ddf8e430: An unknowable stranger with a thousand faces. An endless ocean where the lost swim. A fissure in fate that exists beyond time.
textByHash.21d5a4b440b1cccba56972c22d031337a50dfce8: It twists its way into your very soul, devouring all that you are, until by the time it's done, only one question remains...
textByHash.7ecce384e7295f7656727560aa66614c9b3095e3: Do you think you can save them?
textByHash.82ecf3c0186ce23c1125450dfb02e48ceff4fb36: Oh... I'm sorry. Sometimes it becomes difficult to resist the call. It gets harder with every day that goes by.
textByHash.d4bb8ed4b8e302c778bd5a61ea2e445ec9788cfa: Yes. It wants my soul, and I fear it will soon have it. My strength is leaving me and I cannot hold it back. This city will be my doom.
textByHash.1ff5709bb5cda57e7944c5de51e66b3e6641e7ee: Others still live? I feared I was the last...
textByHash.caa38750300d070f410eb48058e757abd2f1e2ff: Well then that is all the more reason to stay. For the good of my people, for all people, it has to be stopped.
textByHash.91bdee942cb983425d88ccb88d3e705a647ff0c9: Your weapons are worthless. It is not an evil to be slain.
textByHash.8100296bc645661ec40c57c3b7c4a7711c58fe60: The totem. It links our world to the shadows... to it.
textByHash.5338f4d7bb8735353dfc3cab3baec15aa49c8517: A ring? I must see it.
textByHash.a09969f3605125bde70a2f76a90fda6ad506b7ef: Yes. Please bring it to me.
textByHash.df6042c49f6d2a984e3ad29cc47329d676611cd7: There is a great power to this ring, but the shadows here reject it. It must know the ring is a threat.
textByHash.45ef3e437d73350d417877b5216519fb1364cf8e: On its own, yes. The ring can see into the shadows, but it is not of the shadows. However, I have something that is.
textByHash.b27f5e0ac13699ebc4c134f9fa59e1bc73d9eecb: A shard of the totem. Too dangerous to use on its own, but with the power of this ring, perhaps I can make it safe.
textByHash.da2c05fcc4b65c0b21e60b478d46d77633654d0c: There. The fragment should be safe to use now.
textByHash.f9b30913602421d57b9ea6c0a787a5d72835b56a: You said the ring let you enter the shadows, but that is not the case. It simply allowed you a small glimpse into their darkness.
textByHash.83f404f897a21845ec5545f0733e19d854dda8c2: But it rules the shadows. To overcome it, you must enter the shadows as well. The fragment will allow you to do so now.
textByHash.6dc0a31fcf7a7f7e03640b81a897813df71212ea: Yes. Once you enter the shadows, you will be at its mercy. Unless you long for the eternal sea, you would be wise not to stay for long.
textByHash.d407decbc6535f7edd3b3708655c26b30da95426: It is the only way. You must enter the shadows and destroy the totem.
textByHash.10a12451516f33442747aba26dd19715d5cacc3c: Its power is strongest in the sunken cathedral. That is likely where the totem will be found.
textByHash.bc0d49884cf804abff6f62421a0f0eb960f4dfc7: No. It has blocked the way. You will need to clear the path with cleansing flames.
textByHash.b2a0ed69efa57a876f35925f62a4d3422e1a7780: The fire of our world will do nothing in the shadows, but the old inhabitants of this city, they tried to fight off the inevitable darkness. They created things that could help you.
textByHash.9ede662e9a8c53527b413c547ea51951b7625398: If you find their old schematics, bring them to me. I can use them to create new tools for you.
textByHash.aacaa154d7a26ae807289c037ee62568463e20ef: The fragment won't just work anywhere. To enter the shadows, you must use it where they are strongest. Seek out the places where that is the case. You will know them when you see them.
textByHash.2b332d1232c9f4bd46402ca8ee04ddf3180177b1: That is thankfully easier. The fragment will let you leave the shadows whenever you desire. Be sure to use it before darkness claims you.
textByHash.78e7adcbaf2bb6f1d6bda28c77f7b7a7cd8efa59: You know of Camdozaal. That means you have seen what became of our home.
textByHash.a7bc8c23402186c83f7f5bb3bb015644d162ad2c: When the barbarians came, many tried to fight. I should have fought with them, but I turned away. I had a duty to my people, but I abandoned them.
textByHash.6b61e67da00744f40d52790624560736f3ec8143: The barbarians had blocked all exits, so the only way to flee was down. I hid down here while my people died, but now I pay the price for my choice.
textByHash.521160fea83ac4d481016fd9e51eca06bc8e75d8: There are worse things than death, and this city is home to them all.
textByHash.9f62898870ad0aaabe5c6353d2c6bd5cadabf6a4: You misunderstand. Fleeing was not the cause of my guilt. My punishment is for what happened next...
textByHash.936791ba3ee54e16ae632589bda9723fc7ea4b5a: It is best you do not know. Please, let us speak of something else.
textByHash.13f45b96a947ed9c0bd553551991016c0ab70e8b: Lassar. That is what they called this place. It was once home to some of the greatest minds in the world.
textByHash.1f6d28e5e5ceeba9fe76eaae630258e169fae774: It seems they kept it hidden on purpose. This city was a place of discovery, where magic and science were practiced in equal measure. They did not want their secrets falling into the wrong hands.
textByHash.dc28019f31ba61bc19f57e585834f2f0f64733a1: Yes. They remained hidden down here long after their fortress fell. They were still here even after the construction of Camdozaal.
textByHash.14197b9ab34a0c3eeb547863dc016d5474141092: Their isolation kept them safe for a time, but when darkness fell, there was no one to hear their screams.
textByHash.f67c617a0e63ae9d6484d362301db7ba3ed01517: It is beyond our understanding. It exists in the shadows, and there it should remain, but the blackstone is like a blade. It cuts through into our world.
textByHash.6eae48c7ede99cf7c041c025b3ac6dd6b63d0ad3: It comes from the shadows as well. It holds a great power, and many have tried to use it, not knowing the cost of doing so.
textByHash.7105e03f6605433dc06e9603e3635c62260e01df: Yes. They were studying the totem, but in doing so, they followed in our footsteps, dooming their city.
textByHash.a5f842491d394e1ada39c3abc2e91d94793468c1: Camdozaal was not the first home of my people. From a young age, we are all taught of the Fall of Imcandoria, of the disaster that claimed our city.
textByHash.3327b900a962a73b83c655770be865aed38c1952: But down here, I have seen the truth. It was no volcano that destroyed our home, it was the totem.
textByHash.f4aa835538d436cb4d9109d82822906378335496: Did it follow us, or did we follow it? Are we fated to be its victims forevermore? Or will the cycle end here? It will soon be time to find out.
textByHash.8d90b9507acb61ec827af6cdddcb6228ec933508: Yes, I think I can work with this. Give me a moment...
textByHash.f3dfc68d456a97e14797e4a5271cca0e9497cc84: There. You can collect your new item from the workbench. Let me know if you want any information on how it works.
textByHash.578f2bf4c2e4d0f860b036eaebe3a34c0dbf776e: It is a light that will aid you in the shadows, where all other lights fail. It is the only thing that can destroy what lurks there. Use it well.
textByHash.ecfe79f4310401f2c661d57ef8897532d3179830: Almost nothing can stop you from being consumed by the shadows, but set the Shadow Blocker down, and it will provide a small area of safety. It's the only safety you'll get.
textByHash.7fe3e7f246621f769ed88107c5c91fd3a26c8751: Unless you wish for the void, you must not spend too long in the shadows. Once set down, you can use the Revitalising Idol to give you more time there. But remember, time still always runs out in the end.
textByHash.fd7fa62a08b84ab7164e2f3c89e5436cdcddd4d1: Those that lurk in the shadows do not take kindly to we that still live. They will hunt you. Use the Anima Portal to give them something else to hunt. It provides a glimmer of life in their sea of emptiness.
textByHash.32ad2fbe299f5cffde2f7eed999e120966721556: This torch schematic. It's a fake.
textByHash.c1d97327d7480cf5c9d467957f41856d53fe8c35: It is marked by the black hand. This is the doing of the Silent Choir.
textByHash.6bab1993552b55b3878d112c1a58229fbc8ab3d4: They were the first to fall. It corrupted them and made them its own. They undid the work of those that tried to resist. Harbingers for what was to come.
textByHash.b01b4bc2b578bb596f32af62f0f9f97e2adf37d6: You ask many questions. I have one for you.
textByHash.7ee0deb07918dcb5e88dc0f89868f912e1c01321: You did not come to help, but you do so anyway. Why are you here?
textByHash.b10e8b3b10749173cb309a555c38c71f23117ae4: There are many whispers in this city, and it hears them all. Will you join them? Will you join the Silent Choir?
textByHash.cf3934a373428eb6053567cbd9cd89cae475c08f: It sees you. Did you really think you could hide? Did you really think you could save them?
textByHash.b5816250109ffb2a77d36739fe28b751ee7d2914: It knows. It knows what we are trying to do. We must hurry. Soon it will be impossible to resist.
textByHash.5f20880f4353a1d55c7835d0ac7f675c26d11e0c: The Silent Choir. They had a church. They built it somewhere in the city. Somewhere hidden.
textByHash.bf522b31ede6a78f8581f5f56f1bc52d1d5b7e93: Then you must find one of these icons. Be quick. Time is not on our side.
textByHash.7de70617ff2fd052ff8eacf65982a408726e7f0d: The inn. They met there. Hiding in plain sight. Perhaps they left something behind.
textByHash.4efc1c8a046338de99128e0e9ab832fae5c75cdc: Be quick. Time is not on our side.
textByHash.5888ddf8eb2d853d7d50d97f035e29fab55d2b42: You have the icon? Good. You should be able to reach the cistern using the drain in the square outside. Hurry.
textByHash.8b36c2c979b3d653a7994c98505715a82f27053d: You were gone too long. I came to find you, but it already had you. You had fallen.
textByHash.3890f0f66a59d1cef26d5f8a59673eb8214a731a: No... I thought destroying the totem would be enough, but it's already too late. It has claimed this place now. We can never undo that.
textByHash.0ceec805d1899d068dbb379edcba2d64a1031a85: Its influence has been weakened. Without the totem, it cannot spread beyond this city.
textByHash.4c52b82eb8a55829ff21bfb7adb682da9584696a: I thought destroying the totem would be the end. I thought it would bring peace...
textByHash.73b8936ae48fe6e5bf4a883bbda2341b3424db8a: But there is no peace. I still hear their screams. I will never be free of what I did to them.
textByHash.b131d505a63ebca6d424eaa09a5acea3cd916972: Good. Pray that you never have to.
textByHash.652e8fe1e32f0a97ffa8197aa8f7ad181c3a39f1: No more of this. I found the missing schematic in the church. Your new tool is ready. Perhaps you can use it to find what it is you seek here.
textByHash.2ccc3490e1715bc444fc68140ba7d3625f6d3c27: There is a darkness there. I thought it was the totem, but clearly not. Something else lurks in those depths...
textByHash.e9250fe0b351906e87f80ea1bf651914b464468e: I will not be here when you return. My journey in this place is done. It is time to start a new one. I will leave my things on the workbench for you.
textByHash.3a9aa05fb11ee8bbabc71ba637f1b13a1f8576c6: Farewell. Perhaps we will meet again.
textByHash.360c9928450bc57e61d3a3e40b458628e07cd468: I will be departing this place soon. Be careful in the cathedral.
textByHash.eef14584617279b6eb900fc2f1c77a52d18a12d7: Don't you remember how we held back the shadows of Lassar?
